codeReview.summary: The implementation delivers the required unset→allow→deny→unset chip cycle, one dispatch per interaction step, keyboard-operable controls with stateful ARIA labeling, and optimistic rollback with inline status messaging on dispatch failure.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker intentionally deviated from ui-screen-worker's strict RED-first test step because AppState interface expansion was needed before the new component test could compile; this appears to be a recurring mismatch between skill procedure and real implementation flow for interface-surface features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false with deviation on ui-screen-worker step 4; transcript skeleton shows implementation edits before the new test file run.

summary: Reviewed the feature transcript skeleton and commit diff for m3-peer-policy-chip-cycle and found contract-aligned behavior plus focused test coverage, with no blocking code issues.
